view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior for joining the waitlist.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior for joining the waitlist.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior for joining the waitlist.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer joins the waitlist for a fully booked day. However, the evidence does not provide specific checks or confirmations regarding the expected behavior of the waitlist scenario, particularly in terms of how the system handles the waitlist when the capacity is reached. The existing evidence primarily focuses on customer bookings and waitlist entries without addressing the specific scenario of joining the waitlist for a fully booked day, leading to an inconclusive status.
